title: Nustin Lyrics
content:
Nustin Lyrics

do you
see this shit?
been broken into pieces again
been broken into tiny filthy pieces

again again again
slipped tripped blackened eyes
again again
crashed battered shattered
again again
along corroborated crimes/lines

fell from a low hung self
fractions undivided
undivisable


cant glue this shit back together
no way

cant glue together
cant fix these cracks
wont fit again
never again
again again again
